channel.title: LLM Timeline — Tsinghua Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Tsinghua.

item.title: JustRL-Nemotron-1.5B (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: 1.5B License: open Type: model "JustRL, a simple recipe with fixed hyperparameters, achieves state-of-the-art performance on two different 1.5B base models (54.5% and 64.3% across 9 math benchmarks) while using 2× less compute than sophisticated approaches. The same hyperparameters transfer across both models without tuning, and training remains stable over thousands of steps without intervention. This suggests the field may be adding complexity to solve problems that disappear with a stable, scaled-up baseline."

item.title: MiniCPM-2.4B (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: 2.4B License: open Type: model MoE option=https://huggingface.co/openbmb/MiniCPM-MoE-8x2B

item.title: Eurus (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Fine-tune of Mistral-7B and CodeLlama-70B.

item.title: xTrimoPGLM (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: 100B License: closed Type: model Protein language model

item.title: OpenChat (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Llama 2 13B -> OpenChat 13B

item.title: GLM-130B (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: 130B License: open Type: model 50% English (200B tokens), so included here
